channel.title: Use-Cases on AI Benchmark Hub - Svenska
channel.description: Recent content in Use-Cases on AI Benchmark Hub - Svenska

item.title: Academic Research Recommendation: Claude 3 Opus
item.description:
Academic Research → Claude 3 Opus

Användningsöversikt

Claude 3 Opus by Anthropic is a recommended option for the Academic Research use case.

Rekommenderade modeller

Rang Leverantör Kontextfönster Score
#5 Anthropic 200K 56/100

Prestationsanalys

Benchmarkprestanda

Benchmark Poäng
MMLU 81.2
HUMANEVAL 83.3
GSM8K 91.8
MATH 42.7
BBH 81.6
GPQA 46.0

Styrkor

  • MMLU score 81.2, strong knowledge reasoning.
  • HumanEval 83.3, excellent code generation.
  • GSM8K 91.8, robust math reasoning.
  • 支持文本、图像、音频多模态输入。
  • 上下文窗口 200K，支持长文本。

Krav

  • 需要 anthropic 的 API 密钥
  • 输入长度须在 200K 上下文窗口内

item.title: Academic Research: AI Model Selection Guide
item.description:
Academic Research

Användningsöversikt

This page focuses on the Academic Research use case, covering core requirements, recommended models, and evaluation criteria.

Urvalskriterier

  • 上下文窗口 ≥ 32K

Utvärderingskriterier

  • 上下文窗口 ≥ 32K

Bästa praxis

  • 提供系统提示以建立上下文
  • 监控 token 用量与成本

Rekommenderade modeller

See the recommended models list for this use case (path: /en/use-cases/academic-research/).

Användningsöversikt

Claude 3 Sonnet (2024-02-29) by Anthropic is a recommended option for the Vision Understanding use case.

Rekommenderade modeller

Rang Leverantör Kontextfönster Score
#10 Anthropic 200K 36/100

Prestationsanalys

Benchmarkprestanda

Benchmark Poäng
MMLU 84.0
HUMANEVAL 80.1
GSM8K 82.6
MATH 46.4
BBH 76.2
GPQA 41.7

Styrkor

  • MMLU score 84.0, strong knowledge reasoning.
  • HumanEval 80.1, excellent code generation.
  • 支持文本、图像、音频多模态输入。
  • 上下文窗口 200K，支持长文本。

Krav

  • 需要 anthropic 的 API 密钥
  • 输入长度须在 200K 上下文窗口内

item.title: Vision Understanding: AI Model Selection Guide
item.description:
Vision Understanding

Användningsöversikt

This page focuses on the Vision Understanding use case, covering core requirements, recommended models, and evaluation criteria.

Urvalskriterier

  • 支持图像/音频输入

Utvärderingskriterier

  • 支持图像/音频输入

Bästa praxis

  • 提供系统提示以建立上下文
  • 监控 token 用量与成本

Rekommenderade modeller

See the recommended models list for this use case (path: /en/use-cases/vision-understanding/).
